chapter_title.ar: باب تَهْيِئَةِ الْإِمَامِ لِلْجُمُعَةِ وَ خُطْبَتِهِ وَ الْإِنْصَاتِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 70 – The preparation of the prayer leader, and his sermon and the listening (to it)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/355)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/355)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ خُطْبَةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَ قَبْلَ الصَّلَاةِ أَوْ بَعْدُ فَقَالَ قَبْلَ الصَّلَاةِ يَخْطُبُ ثُمَّ يُصَلِّي .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Ali Bin Mahziyar, from Usman Bin Isa,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Maryam, from Abu Ja’farasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the sermon of Rasool-Allahsaww, was it before the Salāt or after it?’ So heasws said: ‘Before the Salāt’. Hesaww addressed, then he prayed Salāt’.
en.sarwar: 3. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Amir from Ali ibn Mahziyar from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from abu Maryam who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the sermon of the Messenger of Allah if it was before or after Salah (prayer). He (the Imam) said, ‘The Messenger of Allah would first deliver sermons, then perform Salah (prayer).”’
